M0790_PR_INHAL_MED (M0790) Prior Management of Inhalant Medications Prior ability to prepare and take inhalant/ mist medications. 00 = Able to independently take the correct medication and proper dosage at the correct times.
01 = Able to take medication at the correct times if: (a) individual dosages are prepared in
